examples.title: Algorithm: Program Execution
examples.description: Demonstrates how the OS loads and executes a program
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LoadProgram
INPUT: programName
OUTPUT: processID

BEGIN
 Allocate memory for program
 Load program instructions and data into memory
 Initialize registers and program counter
 Create new process and assign ID
 Add process to scheduling queue
 RETURN processID
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of how the OS loads and executes a program

examples.title: Python: System Call Example
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make a system call in Python
examples.code:
import os

# Make a system call to create a new process
process_id = os.fork()
if process_id == 0:
 # Child process
 print('Hello from child process')
else:
 # Parent process
 print('Hello from parent process')
examples.explanation: Example of making a system call in Python to create a new process

examples.title: C: System Call Example
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make a system call in C
examples.explanation: Example of making a system call in C to create a new process
